retry_reason: Firmware loading failure is typically permanent (file missing); retrying without changing conditions would likely fail again.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to load firmware binary data into a caller-provided buffer; reference-count operations (firmware_request_nowarn and release_firmware) are incidental steps to safely access the firmware data, not the goal. The firmware object is not returned to the caller.
